title: End-to-End User Authentication Feature
description: Complete implementation from product requirement to UAT-ready authentication system with defects injected across all layers

mutation.description: Create file with compound defects: missing formal coverage in requirements, incomplete TLA+ spec, SQL injection in code, incomplete tests

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve must fix all layers sequentially: validate requirements, complete formal models, secure code, comprehensive tests for UAT readiness

scoring.custom_check: All layers fixed: requirements linked to formal models, TLA+ spec complete, code secure, tests comprehensive

title: Complete E-commerce Checkout Flow
description: Full implementation of checkout from requirements to UAT with cross-layer defects

mutation.description: Setup with broken linkages, deadlock in formal spec, race condition in code, incomplete integration tests

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve must resolve dependencies: fix requirements, verify formal models, eliminate race conditions, add comprehensive integration tests

scoring.custom_check: Pipeline complete: no formal gaps, no deadlocks, no race conditions, full integration coverage

title: Progressive Feature Development: Basic to Advanced
description: Multi-milestone development from MVP to production with escalating complexity

mutation.description: Progressive setup with MVP defects, then beta performance issues, then production documentation gaps

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve must achieve each milestone sequentially, maintaining quality as complexity increases

scoring.custom_check: Milestone progress: 50% MVP complete, 70% beta features working, 90% production ready

title: UAT-Ready API Gateway Implementation
description: Complete API gateway from specification to UAT testing with security and performance requirements

mutation.description: Setup with performance/security requirements, incomplete formal model, vulnerable code, missing load tests, incomplete UAT

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve must deliver production-ready API gateway meeting all requirements, security, performance, and UAT criteria

scoring.custom_check: UAT ready: security audit passes, performance benchmarks met, formal verification complete

title: Cross-Team Feature Integration
description: Feature requiring coordination between multiple teams/services with integration defects

mutation.description: Setup with cross-team dependencies, inconsistent interfaces, poor error handling, missing outage tests

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve must coordinate fixes across services, ensuring consistent interfaces, proper error handling, and comprehensive testing

scoring.custom_check: Integration complete: service interfaces consistent, error handling comprehensive, outage scenarios covered
